SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PAMELA KELLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONI JELSO IS PRESENT. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
